introSection: Acrobat (Japanese: アクロバット) is a steel flying roller coaster located at Nagashima Spa Land in Nagashima, Kuwana, Mie, Japan. It was built on the site of a parking lot. The ride opened on 18 July 2015.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Acrobat is a clone of Manta at SeaWorld Orlando.

fullText:
Acrobat (Japanese: アクロバット) is a steel flying roller coaster located at Nagashima Spa Land in Nagashima, Kuwana, Mie, Japan. It was built on the site of a parking lot. The ride opened on 18 July 2015.

Acrobat is a clone of Manta at SeaWorld Orlando.
